'''Tron Nixx''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who worked as a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]], serving with [[Drek Drednar]] as his main astrogator. Nixx had an uncanny sense of direction and his navigational skills rivaled even those of [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustans]]. This was due to his [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitivity]], which he was unaware of.

==Biography==
Nixx grew up on [[Corlass]], which was a [[Planet/Legends|world]] with a rich tradition of piracy; it was thus only natural that he himself would eventually become a pirate. His navigational skills first manifested themselves when he became lost in [[Quori City]] as a child, yet managed to find his way home safely. His skills were put to use when he began serving aboard a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]]. When he met Drednar, he defected from his [[Starship/Legends|ship]] and joined Drednar's pirates as an astronavigator.<ref name="SD" />

His directional skills were particularly useful when navigating though [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid fields]] and when locating [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] routes. He was not so much interested in the martial aspect of piracy, but more in challenges that the navigational aspects of piracy offered him.<ref name="SD" />
